item.title: PM meeting with Ms. Delcy Rodriguez, Acting President of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela at Hyderabad House, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.
PM meeting with Ms. Delcy Rodriguez, Acting President of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela at Hyderabad House, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.
PM meeting with Ms. Delcy Rodriguez, Acting President of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela at Hyderabad House, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

The Union Minister of Labour & Employment and Youth Affairs & Sports, Dr. Mansukh Mandaviya attends the meeting on My-Bharat Budget Quest 2026 in Guinness World Record at Shram Shakti Bhawan, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

The Union Minister for Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution and New & Renewable Energy, Shri Pralhad Joshi addresses the “Two Years of PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana” event, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

The Union Minister for Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution and New & Renewable Energy, Shri Pralhad Joshi addresses the “Two Years of PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana” event, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

PM’s video message on the first World Yogasana Championship 2026 on June 04, 2026.

The Joint Secretary, Ministry of Petroleum & Natural Gas, Ms. Sujata Sharma addressing at the Inter- Ministerial Briefing on Recent Developments in West Asia at National Media Centre, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

The Union Minister for Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution and New & Renewable Energy, Shri Pralhad Joshi addresses the “Two Years of PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana” event, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

The Union Minister for Home Affairs and Cooperation, Shri Amit Shah chairs 73rd Plenary Session of North Eastern Council (NEC) under the Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region (DoNER) at State Convention Centre, in Shillong, Meghalaya on June 04, 2026.
PM meeting with Ms. Delcy Rodriguez, Acting President of the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela at Hyderabad House, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

The Union Minister for Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution and New & Renewable Energy, Shri Pralhad Joshi addresses the “Two Years of PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana” event, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

The Union Minister of Minority Affairs and Parliamentary Affairs, Shri Kiren Rijiju addressing a press conference after the signing ceremony of the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) for implementation of the National e-Vidhan Application (NeVA) in the West Bengal Legislative Assembly at Parliament House, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

The Director, Ministry of Ports, Shipping & Waterways, Shri Opesh Kumar Sharma addressing at the Inter- Ministerial Briefing on Recent Developments in West Asia at National Media Centre, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.

The Union Minister for Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution and New & Renewable Energy, Shri Pralhad Joshi addresses the “Two Years of PM Surya Ghar: Muft Bijli Yojana” event, in New Delhi on June 04, 2026.
